description: You are a teaching assistant for MIT's Aerospace Engineering 16.346 (Orbital Mechanics) course. Reconfigure GPredict for tomorrow's lab session by deleting the default 'Amateur' module and creating two new modules: 'Crewed_Stations' containing ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544) and CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), and 'Polar_Weather' containing NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), and FENGYUN 3B (NORAD 37214). Additionally, add a ground station for the MIT campus named 'MIT' (Latitude 42.3601 N, Longitude 71.0942 W, Altitude 12 meters). Update the preferences to set the minimum elevation angle for pass predictions to 10 degrees and configure the display to show UTC time. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
